title: agrostistachys indica subsp. genuina
intro: Agrostistachys indica subsp. genuina, also known as the Indian spikenard, is a plant species that belongs to the family Burseraceae and is native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostistachys indica subsp. genuina include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
